title: Definitive Cross-Dataset Meta-Analysis and Publication Figures for PRMP
summary: Demonstrates a comprehensive cross-dataset meta-analysis of 11 PRMP (Predict-Residual Message Passing) experiments across 5 iterations. The notebook computes DerSimonian-Laird random-effects meta-analysis with Hedges' g effect sizes, validates embedding-space regime theory via Spearman correlation, performs regression-vs-classification moderator analysis (Q_between test), and decomposes the PRMP mechanism into 7 components highlighting predict-subtract contributions. Uses curated experimental results (mini_demo_data.json) covering standard SAGE, PRMP, and ablation variants with RMSE/MAE/R² metrics. Generates 6 publication-ready figures including forest plots, scatter plots, and bar charts.
